title: Reinforced Gold
description: Adds a faster, low durability alternative to Netherite.
body:
## Reinforced Gold Ingot
Simply craft 2 Gold and 1 Netherite Scrap in any combination in a crafting table to create 2 Reinforced Gold Ingots. From there, you can craft Reinforced Gold tools and armor as you would with the vanilla equipment.

## Tool Additions
Reinforced Gold tools have less damage and durability, but can attack and mine significantly faster than Netherite. All vanilla main tool types have a Reinforced Gold version.

## Armor Additions
Reinforced Gold armor has less defense and durability than Netherite, but provides Speed I and Jump Boost II when the full set is worn. It's a faster movement alternative to Netherite.
